arts.ttl: “I challenge anyone” – Journalist makes bold claim about signing from Newcastle United, believes move was down to key reason
arts.sum: Lloyd Kelly joined Juventus from Newcastle United on transfer deadline day. The Englishman had arrived at St James’ Park in the summer transfer window on a free transfer and the Magpies will make a profit from his sale in the summer of 2025, as Juventus have an obligation to buy Kelly. arts.ttl: 8 players ruled out but 'new signing' set to play as Newcastle United vs Arsenal full squads drop
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Arsenal both face major team selection decisions ahead of tonight's huge Carabao Cup clash at St James' Park. That means, when looking at the official Arsenal website, the Gunners have 17 senior players available for selection for the game vs Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta outlines his perfect striker on huge hint on next Arsenal transfer
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta insists his ideal frontman must have certain qualities as he outlined what he's looking for in a No.9 after confessing he was disappointed they missed out on securing anyone in the transfer market

arts.sum: Arsenal head to Newcastle United this evening looking to overturn their Carabao Cup semi-final tie. Mikel Arteta’s team are 2-0 down on aggregate after a disappointing defeat at the Emirates last month. However, the Gunners will take confidence from a 5-1 thrashing of Manchester City in the Premier League at the weekend. arts.ttl: Nine players could miss Newcastle vs Arsenal after Mikel Arteta provides injury update
arts.sum: Both Arsenal and Newcastle will have players on the sidelines for tonight's Carabao Cup semi-final. "No news from the game against [Manchester] City and Ben is still out hopefully after the break he will be available," Arteta told reporters on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel Jesus drops injury update days after Ollie Watkins transfer decision
arts.sum: Gabriel Jesus is putting the work in to overcome his knee injury that will see him miss the remainder of the season for Arsenal. At 29, Arsenal were keen to test Aston Villa's resolve over Watkins but never made a second bid having learned of their intention to sell Jhon Duran to Al Nassr.
